atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a title card with white text on a purple background.
The text describes a baking journey involving four attempts at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls.
The text states that the first two attempts tasted great but looked awful.

The text concludes that the 4th attempt conquered everything.

ocr: 1. Cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together.
2. Add flours and mix in well.
3. Pipe 2 inch circles onto baking parchment.
4. Bake for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven.
